# frontegg_entitlements (Data Source)

Paginated lookup of Frontegg entitlements filtered by plan, tenant, user, or assignment level.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "frontegg_entitlements" "for_tenant" {
  tenant_ids   = ["11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111"]
  assign_level = "TENANT"
}

output "tenant_entitlement_ids" {
  value = [for e in data.frontegg_entitlements.for_tenant.entitlements : e.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `assign_level` (String) Restrict to TENANT- or USER-level entitlements.
- `plan_ids` (List of String) Filter by plan IDs.
- `tenant_ids` (List of String) Filter by tenant IDs.
- `user_ids` (List of String) Filter by user IDs.
- `with_relations` (Boolean) Include related plan data in each returned entitlement.

### Read-Only

- `entitlements` (List of Object) Matching entitlements. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entitlements))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--entitlements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entitlements`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `expiration_date` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `plan_id` (String)
- `tenant_id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
